channel.title: Linux on Slhmy's blog
channel.description: Recent content in Linux on Slhmy's blog

item.title: Linux System Cheat List
item.description:
前言

这个“小抄”实际上是一个小记的模式，指我遇到什么相关的问题会在这里记录一下。

What’s the meaning of the return value of fn kill()?

On success (at least one signal was sent), zero is returned. On error, -1 is returned, and errno is set appropriately.
